description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a flat, light gray roof and visible signs of disrepair. The facade features large, arched windows on both floors, most of which are boarded up with wooden planks. The brickwork is partially crumbling, with several bricks missing or scattered around the base, giving the structure a dilapidated appearance. The main entryway is a wooden door, also heavily boarded, and is accessed by a small set of steps with a cardboard box nearby. The windows and door frames are painted white, contrasting with the reddish-brown brick exterior. The overall look suggests an abandoned or condemned urban residence.
description: A two-story, flat-roofed brick house with boarded-up windows and doors, crumbling brickwork, and a neglected, abandoned appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with boarded door, two large arched windows (one on each floor) also boarded, and extensive missing bricks on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid brick wall with no windows or doors, and some missing bricks at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view with two arched windows and a boarded door, less brick damage than the front, but still some missing bricks and a plank leaning against the door.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a solid brick wall, a few missing bricks at the base, and a cardboard box near the back corner.
attribute_entryway_design: Boarded wooden door with small steps, no porch or overhang, and visible damage around the entry.
